title: Simply Allays
description: Allays now come in different colors! Can you get them all?
body:
- - -

### Simply Allays

Allays now have color variants! There are also 3 types which dont spawn as frequently as others so the player can get another challenge!

- - -
<details>
<summary>Showcase with shaders</summary>

![Allays with no shaders](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/DpSKeidC/images/12aaaa6da2c8ccf3bb87392d181994c05eb9bfa4.png)
No shaders
---
![Allays with builders QOL shaders](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/DpSKeidC/images/b20f91363d8e1d74915c60caf541ae01f08f2d46.png)
Builders QOL shaders
---
![Allays with Complementary Shaders](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/DpSKeidC/images/56a98c8d30ed030d7ef53bcefac0217efb7c973f.png)
Complementary Shaders
---
![Allays with Complementary Reimagined Shaders](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/DpSKeidC/images/a7e82c243153583cdd839a2d5c1d8ec234dc4b2b.png)
Complementary Reimagined Shaders
---
![Allays with SuperDuperVanilla Shaders](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/DpSKeidC/images/2759010fcbef44fd9986fb177b04fef420e58cbe.png)
SuperDuperVanilla
---
![Allays with AstraLex Shaders](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/DpSKeidC/images/8cbbe9d8945c8a6353a82a3a5dea9ee3652fe8cb.png)
AstraLex Shaders
---

</details>

- - -

### Dependecies

This pack requires [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) or [Optifine](https://www.optifine.net/home)!

### Contribute

Want to improve the pack?\
Or just a place to chat?\
Then make sure to join my discord server!

### Simply Mobs

If you like this pack then i'm sure you'll like others from the simply mobs series, you can choose some that i put here or look at my profile to see them all!

[Simply Piglins!](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/simply-piglins)

[Simply Zombies!](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/simply-zombies)
